jobDescription.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
jobDescription.summary: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to build premium user interfaces with React and Tailwind CSS. The ideal candidate should have experience in system architecture, micro-frontends, and performance optimization.

candidates.name: Sarah J.

bullets: Led a team of 4 frontend developers to migrate a legacy product to Next.js and Tailwind.
Established corporate component library reducing UI delivery time by 35%.
Improved initial page load speeds by 40% through lazy-loading and bundle split strategies.
Implemented real-time dashboard tracking millions of active telemetry streams.
Architected frontend modular microservice layer using Module Federation.

candidates.education: B.Tech in Computer Science, IIT Bombay
candidates.aiReasoning: Sarah is an outstanding candidate with matching experience in large-scale Next.js and Tailwind applications. She has established UI architectures and possesses all core requirements. Her gap in Docker and Oxlint is minor and easily addressable.

candidates.name: Michael C.

bullets: Managed responsive frontend interface for high-frequency trading platform.
Implemented custom Tailwind plugins for dynamic grid components.
Built containerized node service proxies (Docker) for stateful telemetry endpoints.

candidates.education: M.S. in Software Engineering, BITS Pilani
candidates.aiReasoning: Michael displays deep knowledge in React, Tailwind, and Node.js with strong focus on containerized deployments. His slight gap in Next.js/Vite is offset by his active contributions to complex React architectures.

candidates.name: David K.

bullets: Developed consumer facing React pages with modular CSS grids.
Maintained backend Node controllers for transactional data queries.

candidates.education: B.E. in Information Technology, Delhi Technological University
candidates.aiReasoning: David has a solid foundation in React and Node.js but lacks TypeScript, System Design, and Modern build system experience. He would require active mentoring to fill the Senior profile gaps.

actionableInsights.message: 1 candidate displays TypeScript gaps. Consider basic internal training.
Next.js/Vite gaps found in 2 candidates. Standardizing templates is advised.

summaryReport.recruiterSummary: Based on the semantic analysis of the job description, Sarah J. and Michael C. show strong alignment on React, Tailwind, and Frontend design patterns. There is a general build-tool gap across all resumes (Next.js/Vite skill matching is low).
highlights: Sarah J. stands out as the top candidate (94% match) with proven leadership experience and a complete skill match on required core libraries.
Michael C. is a strong runner-up (89% match) with substantial Docker and Node.js backend toolchain capability.
A general sourcing gap is identified in modern bundle optimization and build configurations (specifically Vite/Next.js).
summaryReport.recommendation: Initiate immediate tech screening interviews with Sarah J., and compare her project portfolios against the target Tailwind spec.
